name: Swipe Action Bar
description: Three (or four) circular icon buttons sitting above the bottom-tab-bar, providing tap-to-act alternatives to swipe gestures: X (pass), Star (super-like), Heart (like), optional Undo. Sized generously (60px) for thumb-friendly tapping. Each button bounces and emits a color burst on tap. Hotkey-bound to ←/↑/→ for desktop testing.

three-button.description: X / Star / Heart — the classic swipe-app trio. Centered horizontally with even spacing. Heart and X are the primary 60px buttons, Star is a smaller premium 48px between them.

four-button.description: Undo / X / Star / Heart variant including an Undo button for restoring the previous swipe. Used when the app supports rewinding.

two-button-minimal.description: Minimal X / Heart only — no super-like, no undo. Used in the simplest swipe flows where dual-rating is sufficient.

visual_brief: A horizontal row of circular icon buttons centered horizontally in their container. The bar typically sits above the bottom-tab-bar but below the swipe deck — visually floating in the lower portion of the screen with generous breathing room. In the three-button preset: PassButton (60×60, white background, soft shadow) on the left with a 24px X Lucide icon in muted gray; SuperLikeButton (48×48, slightly smaller — premium feel) in the center with a 20px Star Lucide icon in violet; LikeButton (60×60) on the right with a 24px Heart Lucide icon in coral. All buttons share the swipecircle-action-button decorator: rounded-full, drop shadow with coral tint, white surface, no border. On hover (desktop): translateY(-2px) lift + shadow intensification. On press: scale(0.92) for 80ms then spring-back to scale(1) over 220ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) — the satisfying button bounce. On tap completion (when the corresponding swipe action commits): a color burst emits from the button — TapBurst — a radial gradient ring expands from the button center, scaling from 0 to 1.4 over 320ms while fading from opacity 0.6 to 0; ring color matches the action (coral for like, muted for pass, violet for super). Hotkey bindings: ArrowLeft triggers PassButton, ArrowRight triggers LikeButton, ArrowUp triggers SuperLikeButton — the corresponding button gets the same press animation when the key fires, providing clear visual feedback for desktop testing. The container itself has 16px vertical padding (py-4) and the gap between buttons is 24px (gap-6) in the three-button preset, balancing reach distance with center-of-screen weight. The bar is intentionally NOT inside the bottom-tab-bar — it floats above as a sibling, separated by 16px of body content space, so the swipe deck can have visual breathing room.

layout_hints.container: horizontal flex bar, centered, with action buttons sized for thumb reach
layout_hints.primary_buttons: 60×60 for primary actions (X, Heart) — the main swipe verbs
layout_hints.secondary_buttons: 48×48 for premium/optional (Star, Undo) — visually smaller to signal lower frequency
layout_hints.spacing: 24px gap in three-button, 20px in four-button, 32px in two-button-minimal — wider gaps emphasize button independence
layout_hints.position: Above bottom-tab-bar, below swipe deck. Not inside the tab-bar.

slots.action-bar: Outer container. Flex-row, items-center, justify-center, gap 24px (preset-dependent), padding 16px 0. Width 100% of parent. Carries aria-label='Swipe actions' and role='toolbar'.
slots.pass-button: Circular button, 60×60, applies the swipecircle-action-button decorator. Contains a 24px X Lucide icon in var(--d-text-muted). data-action='pass'. On click: emits 'swipe-pass' event. Bound to ArrowLeft hotkey.
slots.super-like-button: Circular button, 48×48 (smaller than primaries), white background, soft shadow. Contains a 20px Star Lucide icon in var(--d-secondary) (violet). data-action='super-like'. Conditionally rendered (controlled by feature flag). On click: emits 'swipe-super-like'. Bound to ArrowUp hotkey.
slots.like-button: Circular button, 60×60, applies swipecircle-action-button decorator. Contains a 24px Heart Lucide icon in var(--d-primary) (coral). On hover: icon fills with the primary color (transition fill 200ms ease-out). data-action='like'. On click: emits 'swipe-like'. Bound to ArrowRight hotkey.
slots.undo-button: Circular button, 48×48, optional in four-button preset. Contains a 18px Undo2 Lucide icon in var(--d-text-muted). data-action='undo'. On click: emits 'swipe-undo'. Disabled when no previous swipe to restore.
slots.tap-burst: Pseudo-element overlay on each button. Position absolute, inset 0. On action commit: scales 0→1.4 over 320ms with opacity 0.6→0. Background: radial-gradient with the action's signature color (coral, violet, muted).

keyboard: ArrowUp: trigger Super Like action (if enabled)
Space or Enter: activate focused button
Cmd/Ctrl+Z: trigger Undo (if undo button visible)
accessibility.focus_management: Each button is independently tabbable (tabindex=0). Buttons announce action verb + accessible-name (e.g., 'Pass on Maya'). Hotkey listeners scoped to the page (or active swipe deck) — should respect input_guard so they don't fire while user is typing in a chat input or form field elsewhere on the page.

responsive.mobile: Flex-row with gap 20px — slightly tighter on narrow viewports to keep the bar in thumb reach. All button sizes preserved (60px primary, 48px secondary).
responsive.tablet: Flex-row with gap 24px. Default gaps. Comfortable spacing.
responsive.desktop: Flex-row with gap 24px. Hover states active (lift + shadow). Hotkey indicators may render as tiny labels below the buttons (text-xs, muted) for first-time users.

micro.button-press: scale(0.92) for 80ms, spring back to scale(1) over 220ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
micro.icon-hover-like: Heart icon fill transitions from stroke-only to filled coral over 240ms ease-out (Like button only)
micro.tap-burst: Radial ring scales 0→1.4 with opacity 0.6→0 over 320ms ease-out — emanates from button center on action commit

transitions.hotkey-flash: When a hotkey fires, the corresponding button gets the press animation (scale 0.92 → 1.0 spring) AND a brief outline ring (2px primary-color, scale 1→1.3 opacity 1→0 over 320ms) to confirm the keystroke registered.

composition.SwipeActionBar: ActionBar(flex-row, gap-6, justify-center) > [PassButton + SuperLikeButton(conditional) + LikeButton + UndoButton(conditional)]
